summary.shape_sentence: Opening drive into a midday high, followed by a long afternoon liquidation that still closed slightly above the RTH open.

goat.note: Strong late-morning expansion from roughly 26120 into the 26190-26200 zone.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels on the provided frame; bearish behavior centered on the midday HOD rejection and 14:00 lower-high failure.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels on the provided frame; bullish behavior centered on the opening drive and 11:30 higher-low continuation.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank/castle icons; functional supply near 26190-26212 was respected after lunch.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank/castle icons; functional demand near 26030-26050 held into the close only enough for a partial bounce.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening drive was being digested near 26050-26070 after early upside expansion.
time_markers.12pm_red: Upside continuation was active, pressing toward the eventual HOD zone.
time_markers.2pm_green: Lower-high failure near 26180-26190 began the stronger afternoon sell sequence.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 26050 after a late bounce from the final-hour selloff low.

takeaway: Bullish-close session with a strong morning/midday upside trend that failed after lunch. Reference as a midday-high-into-afternoon-liquidation day where supply near the highs controlled the second half despite a green close.
